title: Pixel Break (Glitch Hop Genre - shot 1)
caption: Gltich Hop genre - untouched pure AI
about: Glitch hop with half-time swing, chopped percussion, punchy sub drops, and syncopated synth stabs; verse rides sparse clicks and wobbling bass, pre-chorus tightens with filter sweeps and vocal chops, chorus hits with big skewed drums and a repeating hook, Processed lead vocal with doubles, stutter edits, and delay throws; bitcrushed fills, reverse blips, and scanline risers between sections, Bright, gritty, and wide with a hard digital edge, glitch hop, simple
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Boot up, I’m awake
Green screen, black cake
Sneak through the code line
Trip on the glitch mine

Thumb on the reset
Caught in the loop yet
Eyes like a screenshot
I got the heat spot

[Pre-Chorus]
Wait for the break
Feel the frame shake
One wrong move
And the whole floor caves

[Chorus]
Glitch hop, glitch hop
Keep it all chopped
Glitch hop, glitch hop
Make the room stop
Tick-tick, then drop
Then it all pops
Glitch hop, glitch hop
Keep it all chopped

[Verse 2]
Late night, bad sync
Heartbeat, fast blink
Static in my grin
Let the noise crawl in

Low bass, bent time
Slip on a clean line
Stacked up, then it bends
And it starts again

[Pre-Chorus]
Wait for the break
Feel the frame shake
One wrong move
And the whole floor caves

[Chorus]
Glitch hop, glitch hop
Keep it all chopped
Glitch hop, glitch hop
Make the room stop
Tick-tick, then drop
Then it all pops
Glitch hop, glitch hop
Keep it all chopped

[Bridge]
Cut loose, fall through
Blue sparks on you
Hold that freeze-frame
Then we switch lanes

[Chorus]
Glitch hop, glitch hop
Keep it all chopped
Glitch hop, glitch hop
Make the room stop
Tick-tick, then drop
Then it all pops
Glitch hop, glitch hop
Keep it all chopped
